slots.notes: Background video for an arcade-style gaming card. Often rendered as a quick preview and then expands to cover the entire background. Optional: looos the video as autoplay with sound muted. Style: vibrant, happy, arcade-romh like a carnival game. No VCRt/Text/Logos. Don’t use relevant posters or photos of cards... Create its own multicolored abstract background in the style of arcade games. Focus on speed, vibrancy, and movement. Suggested source: https://cover.com/ai/video/generator.
A still frame — the player sees this while the video loads (on a slow connection) opt-in. This should look like a still from the video.
A confidence score icon that measures how well this card contributes to the arcade. I prefer a simple progress ring with a fixed value, but it can be anything.
Solid gradient overlay that covers the entire card. Increases readability of white text on colorful backgrounds.
